title: Skinny Mojamuto
body:
Speaking of [Twitter](http://www.xarop.com/twitter/) these hilarious videos by Muchachada Nui came to mind.

I feel GIF (the pixelated Skinny)

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ewI36l\_s4lU

This is my favorite so far, Internet Explorer complains that they have abandoned it.

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uWyKOvX00h0

This other one where [Enjuto Mojamuto](http://twitter.com/enjutomojamuto) says that the characters he admires the most are, among others, the creator (or creators) of *jpeg* and [Edans](http://twitter.com/edans), the one who has the most *followers* on [Twitter](http://www.xarop.com/twitter/), which is false because according to [this ranking](http://www.twittown.com/friends/topfollowers_1) number one is the application [Twitterrific](http://iconfactory.com/software/twitterrific) and number two, and first natural person, [brianshaler](http://twitter.com/brianshaler).

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uQmlKFyvsek

Other videos on internet topics is this one on the webcam

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5AfehMgpgeQ

or this other one about the catastrophe of running out of Internet, the worst day of Enjuto's life and a bad day without it happening to most of us.

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2OBZHB5I89A
